title: Rich Roasted American Chicken Casserole
description: A tangy and cheesy American dish featuring greek yogurt and a mirepoix base, perfect for a date night, served in an agave leaf vessel.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together the greek yogurt, agave nectar, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chopped onion, carrot, and celery to the bowl and stir until they are well coated with the yogurt mixture.
In a separate bowl, toss the chicken breast pieces with the olive oil until they are well coated.
Add the chicken to the bowl with the yogurt mixture and stir until the chicken is well coated.
In a greased agave leaf vessel, arrange half of the chicken and vegetable mixture in the bottom of the vessel.
Sprinkle half of the shredded cheddar cheese over the top of the chicken and vegetable mixture.
Repeat the layers, starting with the remaining chicken and vegetable mixture, and then the remaining shredded cheddar cheese.
Cover the vessel with aluminum foil and bake for 30 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 20 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
